spec_compliance.rule: name: lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens only

spec_compliance.detail: Description includes trigger phrases and clear purpose
allowed-tools lists Read, Bash, Write, Glob

security_findings.title: Properly scoped tools
security_findings.detail: allowed-tools is declared and limits the agent to Read, Bash, Write, and Glob

best_practices.title: Good progressive disclosure
best_practices.detail: Reference docs in references/ directory, script in scripts/ — loaded on demand

best_practices.title: Bundled pre-processor script
best_practices.detail: Deterministic work handled by a Python script rather than LLM reasoning

grade_assessment: A well-structured skill with proper progressive disclosure, scoped tools, and clear instructions.
grade_strengths: Properly scoped allowed-tools limits agent capabilities to what is needed.
Good progressive disclosure with reference docs and bundled scripts.
Clear step-by-step instructions with error handling guidance.
Description includes trigger phrases for accurate activation.
grade_improvements: Directory name does not match the skill name in frontmatter.
Could include example CSV input and expected report output.
